rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the load-bearing concept (type system), shows where the draft drifts from it (runtime predicate checking), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks uncertainty for one claim by flagging the misuse of 'type system'.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (misleading claims about the contribution) and proposes corrections.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced but minor edits are not.
